channel.title: Comments on: Harpoon Brewery: Summer Ale – Ep. 150
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Mark Sargent
item.dc:creator: Mark Sargent
item.description: I am glad that you reviewed Harpoon Summer. We look forward to it every Spring. Harpoon brews several good beers and prints the bottled date on their bottles, so you know you are having a fresh beer. Try their chocolate stout seasonal also. It is very good.
item.content:encoded: I am glad that you reviewed Harpoon Summer. We look forward to it every Spring. Harpoon brews several good beers and prints the bottled date on their bottles, so you know you are having a fresh beer. Try their chocolate stout seasonal also. It is very good.

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description: Harpoon has one of the best brewery tours (get your ticket early). And if happen to be visiting Boston on a cruise ship, you can walk to the brewery in 10 minutes ... and stumble your way back on board.
item.content:encoded: Harpoon has one of the best brewery tours (get your ticket early). And if happen to be visiting Boston on a cruise ship, you can walk to the brewery in 10 minutes … and stumble your way back on board.
